projects_date_range_check.name: projects_date_range_check
projects_date_range_check.value: "projects"."start_date" IS NULL OR "projects"."due_date" IS NULL OR "projects"."start_date" <= "projects"."due_date"

tasks_recurrence_instance_unique_idx.name: tasks_recurrence_instance_unique_idx
tasks_recurrence_instance_unique_idx.where: "tasks"."recurrence_rule_id" IS NOT NULL AND "tasks"."scheduled_for" IS NOT NULL AND "tasks"."deleted_at" IS NULL
